did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a comprehensive review article that analyzes and summarizes existing literature on machine learning and deep learning for skin cancer detection. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI/ML models to new data; rather, it discusses advancements, challenges, and applications reported in other studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
